I had been using Groww for over a year and was generally satisfied with the platform. However, after closing my demat account for personal reasons, I received a follow-up call regarding the closure. While I understand the need to collect feedback, I was disappointed by the tone of the conversation. The representative repeatedly questioned why I had closed the account and seemed overly insistent, even after I had explained my reasons. The interaction felt intrusive and uncomfortable.

​The bond investment experience on Groww is currently the worst I've seen compared to other platforms. It feels like the feature was added just for the sake of it, completely lacking critical tracking insights. For any invested bond, there is no clear breakdown of the invested amount, the repayment schedule, or the exact dates payouts will reflect in my account. Furthermore, the holdings section doesn't accurately reflect the actual amount in my portfolio analysis Stop adding half-baked feature

Worst trading application with very poor customer support. They initially confirmed that my commodity trading issue was settled and that compensation would be credited. Later, they reversed their decision and provided an unreasonable explanation to deny compensation. The lack of accountability, inconsistent communication, and poor customer handling make this a highly disappointing experience. I would not recommend this platform to traders looking for reliable service and support.
